indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: no horizontal rest surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other horizontal rest surface present.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains provide light control or privacy.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: No furniture indicates a lack of personal space.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There are no horizontal rest surfaces, no windows or curtains for light control or privacy, and no furniture to provide personal space. The hard industrial surfaces further contribute to the unsuitability of the space.
